title: build(deps): bump github.com/opencontainers/selinux from 1.10.2 to 1.11.0
body:
Bumps [github.com/opencontainers/selinux](https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux) from 1.10.2 to 1.11.0.
Release notes

Sourced from github.com/opencontainers/selinux's releases.

v1.11.0

What's Changed

  • Bump to 1.10.2 by @​rhatdan in opencontainers/selinux#182
  • gha: add go1.19, drop go1.16, update golangci-lint to v1.49 by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#183
  • go-selinux: remove redundant stub for DisableSecOpt() by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#187
  • remove vendor directory by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#186
  • go-selinux: remove fallbacks for go < 1.16 by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#184
  • pkg/pwalk: deprecate in favor of pkg/pwalkdir by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#185
  • go-selinux: some cleanup/refactor and improve test coverage by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#190
  • gha: also test and lint stubs by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#189
  • use filepath instead of path by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#188
  • golangci-lint: enable more linters and address linting issues by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#191
  • Adds MLSEnabled function. by @​badochov in opencontainers/selinux#192
  • go-selinux: add coverage for LfileLabel, LsetFileLabel by @​thaJeztah in opencontainers/selinux#194
  • Add Go 1.20 support; require Go 1.19; drop Go 1.17 and 1.18 by @​austinvazquez in opencontainers/selinux#195
  • Add ability to set fscontext mounts points by @​rhatdan in opencontainers/selinux#196

New Contributors

  • @​badochov made their first contribution in opencontainers/selinux#192
  • @​austinvazquez made their first contribution in opencontainers/selinux#195

Full Changelog: https://github.com/opencontainers/selinux/compare/v1.10.2...v1.11.0

Commits
  • b68c45e Bump to v1.11.0
  • 861be7b Merge pull request #196 from rhatdan/fscontext
  • 46964d1 Merge pull request #195 from austinvazquez/add-go-1.20
  • c78503f Add ability to set fscontext mounts points
  • f257026 Add Go 1.20 support; require Go 1.19; drop Go 1.17 and 1.18
  • 9538649 Merge pull request #194 from thaJeztah/lfilelabel_coverage
  • d6656c6 go-selinux: add coverage for LfileLabel, LsetFileLabel
  • bc94efc use safer path for stub tests
  • 41ff4c2 Merge pull request #192 from badochov/is_selinux_mls_enabled
  • d592efa Adds MLSEnabled function.
  • Additional commits viewable in compare view

Dependabot commands and options
You can trigger Dependabot actions by commenting on this PR: - `@dependabot rebase` will rebase this PR - `@dependabot recreate` will recreate this PR, overwriting any edits that have been made to it - `@dependabot merge` will merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot squash and merge` will squash and merge this PR after your CI passes on it - `@dependabot cancel merge` will cancel a previously requested merge and block automerging - `@dependabot reopen` will reopen this PR if it is closed - `@dependabot close` will close this PR and stop Dependabot recreating it. You can achieve the same result by closing it manually - `@dependabot ignore this major version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this major version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this minor version` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this minor version (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself) - `@dependabot ignore this dependency` will close this PR and stop Dependabot creating any more for this dependency (unless you reopen the PR or upgrade to it yourself)
